Headline: #22 Clark Temporary Northbound Reroute near Dearborn/Chicago
ShortDescription: Northbound #22 Clark buses are rrtd via Dearborn, Superior, State, Chicago and Dearborn then over regular route due to street blockage near Dearborn/Chicago.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #22 Clark buses are temporarily rerouted via Dearborn, Superior, State, Chicago and Dearborn then over regular route due to street blockage near Dearborn/Chicago.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
